nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Public GET /webhook/v/:token. Renders the personalised video landing page using token to look up video_renders + lead. Page is mobile-responsive, brand-purple, autoplay muted (click-to-unmute), tracks engagement events to clx-video-engagement-tracker via fetch on the page. Booking CTA links to client.calendly_url or generic /book.

parameters.responseBody:
Link not valid

This video link is invalid or expired. Reach out to the sender for a fresh link.
